name: Sri Trang Gloves (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Sri Trang Gloves (Thailand) Public Company Limited produces and sells rubber gloves in Singapore, Thailand, the United States, China, Germany, Japan, and internationally. It provides natural rubber powdered, natural rubber powderfree, and nitrile butadiene rubber gloves under the Satory, Finnx, and Sri Trang Gloves brand names for various applications, including healthcare and medical, as well as food processing, handling, manufacturing, and operations. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Hat Yai, Thailand. Sri Trang Gloves (Thailand) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Sri Trang Agro-Industry Public Company Limited.
